3061890.name: Me The Gravekeeper
3061890.description:
Ready to become a gravekeeper? Experience the cemetery management simulation in Me the Gravekeeper!

🎮You won’t just protect the graves from various obstacles but also take full control of managing your own graveyard.

⛏️Each body that arrives must be given a proper burial and that means digging the grave yourself.

⚰️After digging, you’ll need to carry the corpse to its grave. Or, make your life easier by hiring pallbearers to do the heavy lifting for you

💰 Decorate your graves with lamps, statues, fences, and other ornaments to raise their value and sell them for a higher price.

🌸 Pick flowers growing around your cemetery and sell them at your flower shop for extra income.

👴You’ll be personally trained by Grandpa himself, and of course, you'll become his successor as the gravekeeper.

🧟 Graveyard full? No problem! When a body decomposes, just clean up the plot and put it back on the market. Recycling at its finest!
3061890.supported_languages:
英语, 印度尼西亚语, 印地语*, 俄语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
